canonicalEnvironments.label: Local
canonicalEnvironments.purpose: Laptop docker-compose + MinIO; pre-validated storage_backends rows. Not a customer runtime.

canonicalEnvironments.label: Dev
canonicalEnvironments.purpose: First deployed env; real cloud project. PULSE chat/builder runs here.

canonicalEnvironments.label: Integration
canonicalEnvironments.purpose: Pre-prod cloud env for integration testing.

canonicalEnvironments.label: UAT
canonicalEnvironments.purpose: User acceptance testing pre-prod cloud env.

legacyToCanonical.rationale: Legacy uppercase form of local env.
Pre-Phase-1 deploy controller persisted DEV; V103 backfills.
Shorthand alias used by some legacy callers.
Pre-Phase-1 deploy controller persisted INTEGRATION; V103 backfills.
Shorthand alias historically used by chat tools.
Pre-Phase-1 deploy controller persisted PRODUCTION; V103 backfills.

rejectedInputs.reason: null is rejected with IllegalArgumentException by parse(); normalizeNullable() returns null without throwing.
blank string is rejected with IllegalArgumentException.
whitespace-only string is rejected with IllegalArgumentException.

boundaryEnforcement.behavior: Accepts canonical lowercase or any legacy alias; returns canonical lowercase. Null/blank input defaults to 'dev' to preserve historical behavior.
Path/query env normalized via DeploymentEnvironment.normalize before persistence/lookup; unknown values return 400 invalid_environment.
Normalizes the env argument before storage_backends lookup so 'DEV' and 'dev' both hit the same row.
Accepts canonical lowercase or any legacy alias. YAML config keys may use either case for backward compatibility (existing pulse.gcp.environment-projects.DEV is honored).
When isLocalStub() returns true, the env segment of the local-stub filename is normalized to canonical lowercase. Real GSM mode drops the env segment entirely (project id partitions per env).

tablesUpdated.rule: Lowercase via mapping LOCAL→local, DEV→dev, INT→integration, INTEGRATION→integration, UAT→uat, PROD→prod, PRODUCTION→prod.
tablesUpdated.notes: Older deployment_targets rows persisted by DeployController predate the normalization flip and may hold uppercase values. The migration only updates rows whose value differs from canonical; unknown values are intentionally left untouched for human review.
V10__sor_connector_catalog.sql seeded credential_profiles with environment='DEV'. The migration normalizes those rows to 'dev' so future lookups by canonical key resolve.

tablesUpdated.rule: Same mapping; jsonb_set rewrites the targetEnvironment value in place.
tablesUpdated.notes: Older deployments copied target.environment into metadata.targetEnvironment in legacy uppercase form. The migration rewrites only mismatched values.

tablesIntentionallyUntouched.reason: Already canonical lowercase, with chk_storage_backends_environment CHECK constraint enforcing ('local','dev','integration','uat','prod') since V96 + V98.
